characters.appearance: Young adult male with a slim build, light complexion, and short brown hair. He is clean-shaven with expressive facial features. He appears energetic and relatable.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a black t-shirt underneath an unbuttoned black, white, and green plaid flannel shirt, paired with grey pants.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, ranging from frustrated to happy and relaxed.

characters.appearance: Adult male with an athletic build, dark complexion, and short black hair. He has a warm, engaging smile and clear facial features.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a simple, solid light green crew-neck t-shirt.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Career hack. English बोलने के लिए आपको मोटी grammar books रटने की ज़रूरत नहीं है। [Career hack. To speak English, you don't need to memorize thick grammar books.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out a common frustration (grammar rules).
- Replaces the travel/Spanish hook with a career/English hook relevant to Indian professionals.
- Sets a practical, relatable tone immediately.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
CAREER HACK: You don't need to memorize grammar books to speak fluent English
Actor portrayal based on real user reviews.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova app आपकी English speaking का cheat code है। [Supernova app is the cheat code for your English speaking.]
Character A says: इसमें एक AI tutor है जिससे आप real-life conversations practice कर सकते हो। [It has an AI tutor with which you can practice real-life conversations.]
Unknown speaker says: Good morning, how can I help you? [Good morning, how can I help you?]
Character A says: Good morning, I have a meeting. [Good morning, I have a meeting.]
Character A says: और जहाँ आप गलती करते हो, ये दोस्त की तरह सही करता है। [And wherever you make a mistake, it corrects you like a friend.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the solution to speaking hesitation.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor feature with a practical, workplace-style greeting.
- Emphasizes a non-judgmental, friendly learning environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova is a cheat code
to fix your English speaking.
Good morning!
Practice with an AI tutor
that speaks back to you
Good morning, I have a meeting.
Corrects you like a friend
as you go.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सच बताऊँ तो, English सीखना इतना आसान कभी नहीं लगा। [To be honest, learning English never felt this easy.]
Character A says: No boring lectures. [No boring lectures.]
Character A says: सिर्फ वो English जो असल ज़िंदगी में काम आए। [Only the English that is useful in real life.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validates the user's past struggles with traditional studying.
- Highlights the intuitive, practical nature of Supernova's curriculum.
- Uses expressive relief to show the emotional payoff of finding the right tool.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Learning English
never felt this easy
No boring lectures
Learn real-world English
that actually works

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: And the best part is, मैं रोज़ बस दस मिनट अपने फ़ोन पर practice करता हूँ, office जाते हुए या घर के काम करते हुए। [And the best part is, I just practice for ten minutes daily on my phone, while commuting to the office or doing chores.]
Character A says: तो ये मेरे busy schedule में आराम से fit हो जाता है। [So it easily fits into my busy schedule.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows how easily the app integrates into a busy working professional's life.
- Lowers the barrier to entry by suggesting short, daily practice sessions.
- Maintains the visual connection to daily chores and routines.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
And the best part is -
I just practice with my phone
for 10 mins/day
while commuting
or doing chores.
So it fits into
my busy schedule.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: कुछ ही हफ़्तों की practice के बाद, मेरे भाई ने अपना job interview पूरी confidence के साथ English में clear कर लिया, बिना अटके। [After just a few weeks of practice, my brother cleared his job interview in English with full confidence, without hesitating.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the vacation/taxi payoff with a high-stakes career payoff (job interview).
- Highlights the ultimate goal for the target audience: speaking confidently without hesitation.
- Keeps the relatable 'sibling/friend success story' framing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
After a few weeks
of practice,
my brother cleared
his job interview
in fluent English
WITHOUT hesitating
or getting stuck

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अगर आप सच में अपनी English improve करना चाहते हैं, तो I highly recommend Supernova. [If you really want to improve your English, then I highly recommend Supernova.]
Character B says: नीचे दिए गए link पर click करें और आज ही app download करें। [Click the link below and download the app today.]
Character A says: अपनी झिझक को पीछे छोड़ें, और बोलना शुरू करें। [Leave your hesitation behind, and start speaking.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, encouraging call to action.
- Removes the '7 days free' and 'zero risk' messaging to align with Supernova's paid model.
- Ends on an empowering note about overcoming hesitation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Excellent!
If you're serious
about learning
English,
I highly recommend Supernova
Gain confidence through daily practice
Learn practical expressions with Supernova.
Click the link below
to download
the app
Leave your hesitation behind.
Start speaking today.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clean visual wrap-up.
- Reinforces the brand name and the primary action (downloading the app).
- Removes free trial text.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Download Supernova and start
speaking confidently today
